query:
SELECT p.id, p.name, p.projectState, COALESCE(p.productLane,'null') AS productLane,
       p.sector, LEFT(p.stage,70) AS stage, p.stageCode, p.lifecycleStatus,
       COUNT(CASE WHEN c.contactTrustTier = 'send_ready' 
                   AND c.company NOT LIKE '%atlascopco%' 
                   AND (c.email IS NULL OR c.email NOT LIKE '%@atlascopco.com%') THEN 1 END) AS real_sr,
       COUNT(CASE WHEN c.contactTrustTier = 'named_unverified' THEN 1 END) AS nu
FROM projects p
LEFT JOIN contactProjects cp ON cp.projectId = p.id
LEFT JOIN contacts c ON c.id = cp.contactId
WHERE p.priority = 'hot'
  AND p.actionTier = 'tier1_actionable'
  AND (p.suppressed IS NULL OR p.suppressed = 0)
  AND (p.projectState IN ('NSW','VIC','SA','TAS') OR p.location LIKE '%new south wales%' OR p.location LIKE '% NSW%' OR p.location LIKE '%victoria%' OR p.location LIKE '% VIC%' OR p.location LIKE '%south australia%' OR p.location LIKE '% SA%' OR p.location LIKE '%tasmania%' OR p.location LIKE '% TAS%')
  AND (p.productLane IS NULL OR p.productLane NOT IN ('bess','pal','pumps'))
GROUP BY p.id
ORDER BY real_sr DESC, nu DESC
LIMIT 10;

mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway02.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user HWMKhVWm4R1gayY.38561a93bc5c --database 3SMu786VMCWdCnmNSx6pxw --execute 
SELECT p.id, p.name, p.projectState, COALESCE(p.productLane,'null') AS productLane,
       p.sector, LEFT(p.stage,70) AS stage, p.stageCode, p.lifecycleStatus,
       COUNT(CASE WHEN c.contactTrustTier = 'send_ready' 
                   AND c.company NOT LIKE '%atlascopco%' 
                   AND (c.email IS NULL OR c.email NOT LIKE '%@atlascopco.com%') THEN 1 END) AS real_sr,
       COUNT(CASE WHEN c.contactTrustTier = 'named_unverified' THEN 1 END) AS nu
FROM projects p
LEFT JOIN contactProjects cp ON cp.projectId = p.id
LEFT JOIN contacts c ON c.id = cp.contactId
WHERE p.priority = 'hot'
  AND p.actionTier = 'tier1_actionable'
  AND (p.suppressed IS NULL OR p.suppressed = 0)
  AND (p.projectState IN ('NSW','VIC','SA','TAS') OR p.location LIKE '%new south wales%' OR p.location LIKE '% NSW%' OR p.location LIKE '%victoria%' OR p.location LIKE '% VIC%' OR p.location LIKE '%south australia%' OR p.location LIKE '% SA%' OR p.location LIKE '%tasmania%' OR p.location LIKE '% TAS%')
  AND (p.productLane IS NULL OR p.productLane NOT IN ('bess','pal','pumps'))
GROUP BY p.id
ORDER BY real_sr DESC, nu DESC
LIMIT 10;
